title: Assistant Store Manager - Spar India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Spar India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Spar India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
